item.title: 8 of the Best New Nonfiction Books of March 2026
item.description: This month is full of heavy hitters, including everything from hefty biographies to quiet ruminations on the small beauties in life.

item.title: March Historical Fiction New Releases

item.title: A Book for Schitt’s Creek Fans, Norse Mythology, and More New YA Releases For March 4, 2026
item.description: Doing Death's dirty work, Norse mythology, a family-centered story for fans of Schitt's Creek, and more of this week's dynamite YA book releases.

item.title: Sleuth Into March’s New Mystery & Thriller Adaptations
item.description: Watch a hot mess PI in Florida, Nicole Kidman and Jamie Lee Curtis as sisters in a medical thriller, and more in this month's adaptations.
